rules.remediation: repair collector-output interpretation and exact next-step guidance
deep_regression: re-test retrieval guidance and NEXT_GET_FILE handling
rules.reason: Wrong output interpretation can block or mislead operators during collection follow-through.

rules.remediation: repair operator workflow guidance and command-lane separation
deep_regression: re-test command quoting and command-lane separation
rules.reason: Operator-side workflow issues can break collection even when source files are otherwise correct.

rules.remediation: repair large-file fallback and staged-intake guidance
deep_regression: re-test bounded guidance when full upload is impossible
rules.reason: Large-file handling failures can dead-end the workflow on realistic operator inputs.

deep_regression: re-test refusal to overclaim from partial scope
rules.reason: Confidence and scope errors degrade trust and can misstate case posture.

rules.remediation: repair packaging assumptions and bundle generation alignment
deep_regression: verify knowledge-doc asset handling and collector runtime mapping
rules.reason: Packaging drift can make otherwise-correct fixes unusable in practice.

rules.remediation: repair Gemini routing and alert-triage-to-collector escalation behavior
deep_regression: re-test collector-escalation recommendations during alert triage
rules.reason: Routing and escalation defects distort the merged Gemini workflow even when downstream steps are sound.

rules.remediation: apply wording-only polish after correctness items are complete
deep_regression: targeted spot-check after the wording fix
rules.reason: Polish-only issues should not preempt correctness or operator-blocking fixes.

rules.remediation: classify the live-test issue explicitly before fixing it
deep_regression: apply deep regression if the repaired path is testable
rules.reason: Unclassified findings should still be turned into explicit next actions instead of being ignored.
